title: cortex.signal.<verb>.<scope>.v1 data payload
description: V12 — Temporal-shaped human-in-loop NATS signal. Subject pattern: cortex.signals.<runId>.<signalName>. JetStream stream CORTEX_SIGNALS keeps the last value per subject so a slow subscriber still receives the latest decision.

runId.description: Paperclip run identifier the signal is targeted at.

approver.description: Username or service account that issued the decision.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the decision was recorded.

reason.description: Optional free-form rationale captured by the dashboard.
